name: AI Guardian Angel
description: Privacy-first AI safety system with on-device threat detection and emergency protocols
longDesc: A state-of-the-art safety ecosystem featuring on-device ML for real-time threat detection (screams, stress). Multi-layered emergency protocols (Loud & Stealth modes), AES-256 encrypted evidence gathering, and wearable integration. Developed during WebVerse Cohort 1.

name: FoodConnect Bharat
description: 5G-powered food surplus redistribution platform connecting donors, NGOs & volunteers
longDesc: Real-time food waste reduction system using Next.js 15 and MongoDB Atlas. Features role-based dashboards with hunger heatmaps, allergen matching, and automated logistics routing to bridge the gap between surplus food and those in need.

name: CGPA Calculator
description: Comprehensive academic performance tracking and prediction tool
longDesc: A specialized tool for students to calculate and track their CGPA across semesters. Features GPA prediction, credit hour management, and visual progress tracking to help students maintain their academic goals.
